name: Fusion-io, Inc.
description: Fusion-io, Inc. designs and delivers hardware and software solutions that improve the performance and efficiency of data centers. The company's primary products are solid-state storage technology devices, such as PCIe-based flash memory cards, which are designed to accelerate databases, virtualization, cloud computing, and big data applications. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, Fusion-io was acquired by SanDisk Corporation in 2014.
